headline: Emerson Gears Up to Post Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: EMR heads into Q2 earnings with expected growth from automation, software and power markets, though rising costs may pressure margins.

headline: Dividend Income Update Q2, Q3, Q4 2025
summary: The market may move up and down irrationally and seemingly on a whim, while our dividends remain much more stable, reliable and predictable. Read more here.
